videos.title: Hot Take: Silver Is the Most Important Layer in Medallion Architecture (Not Gold)
videos.description:
Sooo is Silver layer overengineering — or the foundation of real data products?

In this video, Marthe challenge Patrick and the idea that medallion architecture is just ceremony. 

See why standardizing in Silver enables scalable Gold data products, reduces duplication, and supports multiple teams without chaos.
✅ When simplified architectures work
✅ Why Silver is about contracts, not cleanup
✅ How Gold should own business logic
✅ A practical Fabric demo
